training_status: Active, lean bulking with heavy lifting

benefits.description: Roughly 3 months cycle of Tesamorelin on 5-on-2-off schedule during lean bulk produced good results

protocol_notes: Used Tesamorelin on a 5-on-2-off weekly schedule during a lean bulk cycle of approximately 3 months. Notes the 5-on-2-off schedule is based on available research at time of use, not personally verified, and others say it may not be necessary.
